name: cowork-second-brain
description: Build a local-first Obsidian second brain and wire it into Claude Cowork. Multi-vault aware. No MCP, no API keys, no Local REST API plugin — Cowork reads your vault files directly via a safe-zones carve-out. Three canonical prompts (build / update / health-check) plus a weekly rhythm. Built by Nuno Tavares of Automated Marketer.
